title: penstemon minor
intro: Penstemon minor, also known as dwarf penstemon or Rocky Mountain penstemon, is a perennial plant belonging to the plantain family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Penstemon minor include its ability to support respiratory health and reduce fever, making it a useful remedy for colds and flu. Penstemon minor can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested as needed.
